stonetop.summary: A willow-draped fae who 'helps' the frightened into a cool, muddy grave.

system.concept: A willow-draped fae who 'helps' the frightened into a cool, muddy grave.
system.description: She appears out of the shadows, when the fear rises up to take you: tall and grim and looming, draped in willow branches, moths flitting all about. She reaches out a bony hand. 'Hush dear,' she whispers. 'Auntie Sallow is here to help.' She was beautiful once, the minder of a sacred grove of clean water, butterflies, and bees — until war brought fire, poison, and endless pain. It was in grief that L'bin'bozia found her, and gave her the strength to 'help': to find the innocent who suffer and offer them the safety of her master's cool embrace.
